headline: DriveNets Extends AI Networking portfolio with High-Capacity AI Fabric Platforms
summary: DriveNets, a leader in large-scale networking, today announced the expansion of its AI Fabric portfolio, introducing DriveNets 2600SL and 2601S, networking platforms designed for large-scale AI infrastructures with hundreds of thousands of XPUs. These high-performance platforms are based on Broadcom's Tomahawk 6 (TH6) ASIC with a total capacity of 102.4Tbps, across 64 ports of 1.6Tbps - which industry analysts expect to make up the majority of new AI ports deployed by 2027. The platforms will sh

headline: AI Chips Update - Etched Unveils AI Chip with $1 Billion in Contracts
summary: Etched has emerged from stealth mode, unveiling its working AI chip alongside securing over $1 billion in customer contracts. The company announced the raising of $800 million in funding, highlighting significant support from notable investors and thought leaders in the AI field. Etched has achieved first-pass silicon success and is validating its rack-scale inference systems with clients, aiming to make AI inference significantly faster, cheaper, and more efficient. With production ramping...

headline: This Semiconductor ETF’s 96% Gain Hinges on a Single $1 Trillion Question
summary: The iShares Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ:SOXX) has had one of the most violent round trips in its history. SOXX is up 96% year to date and 148% over the past 12 months, yet it just shed almost 8% in a single week, closing near $590. headline: Broadcom Vs. Marvell: Why Broadcom’s Custom Silicon Dominance Crushes Marvell’s Premium-Priced AI Growth
summary: Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) and Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL) both posted earnings centered on custom AI silicon. Broadcom reported Q2 FY2026 revenue of $22.187 billion, up 47.9% year over year, on June 3, 2026. Marvell followed with $2.418 billion in Q1 FY2027 revenue on May 27, 2026.
